growth_picks.analyst_take: NVDA is the standout growth-at-reasonable-price name in the basket: 85% revenue growth, 63% profit margins, and a PEG of 0.66 — yet trading at 17x forward earnings with 38% upside to consensus. The 5.5/6 score loses only the short_dynamics half-point on a 0.73% MoM tick higher off a tiny 1.2% base. Highest-conviction BUY despite proximity to highs, given valuation supports continued participation.
